design_philosophy.core_loop: Select team formation and strategy, execute match tactics through manual ball control and positioning, manage stamina and player positioning across 90-minute matches
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real-time strategic decision-making between offensive and defensive play; managing limited time to score or defend in scenario mode
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Managing and competing with national soccer teams across multiple tournaments and competitive formats; recreating famous historical match moments
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Heavy emphasis on strategic team formations (16 available) and tactical setup (8 strategies) over arcade-style gameplay; scenario mode grounds experience in real historical matches rather than pure competition

difficulty.checkpointing: Matches can be resumed via password system; no mid-match saving
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Extensive customization options: selectable skill levels, goalkeeper handicap adjustment, weather conditions, stadium selection, and difficulty scaling in scenario mode (defend result vs. mount comeback)

progression.unlock_mechanism: 36 national teams organized into 6 regional groups; accessible from game mode selection
replayability_hooks: Multiple tournament formats (Short League 24-team, Short Tournament 64-team, International Cup, European Cup, World Series 48-team)
12 scenario challenges based on historical matches with varying difficulty conditions
Training modes with skill challenges and records to beat

world_building_techniques: Historical match recreation in scenario mode with contextual match conditions
Real football venue representation through 8 distinct stadiums with varying dimensions and materials
Weather system affecting play style and strategy
Regional team grouping reflecting real international football structure

faction_indicators: Regional rivalry emphasized through tournament structure (European Cup, International Cup)
Euro 96 qualifier matches featuring real competitive tensions
danger_signals: Scenario mode highlights historical upsets (Bulgaria defeating Germany 3-2, Turkey defeating Sweden, Croatia defeating Italy)
Comeback scenarios force player to overcome adversity within time constraints
environmental_storytelling: Eight distinct national stadiums with unique pitch dimensions and décor
Weather conditions altering match dynamics and strategy
